tagline: Fort Lauderdale & Miami's Premier Luxury Pool Design, Leak Detection & Concierge Care

hero.headline:
Luxury Pools Designed for South
Florida Living
hero.subheadline: For over 25 years, Somar Pools has crafted award-winning pools for South Florida's most discerning homeowners. From custom design and construction to leak detection and concierge-level maintenance, we deliver white-glove service that matches the prestige of your property.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Full-Service Luxury Pool Care<br class="hidden md:block"> From Design to Daily Maintenance
services.subtitle: Whether you are envisioning a breathtaking new pool, solving a persistent leak, or seeking concierge-level weekly care, Somar Pools delivers precision-crafted solutions for every aspect of pool ownership.

cards.title: Custom Pool Design & Build
cards.description: Visionary luxury pool design and construction combining cutting-edge engineering with breathtaking aesthetics for South Florida's most prestigious properties.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repair
cards.description: State-of-the-art electronic listening devices, pressure testing, and dye-tracing technology to pinpoint and resolve leaks other companies miss.

cards.title: Concierge Pool Maintenance
cards.description: White-glove weekly service with proactive monitoring, detailed reporting, and meticulous care that keeps your pool pristine year-round.

cards.title: Pool Renovation & Remodeling
cards.description: Award-winning renovation services backed by six Houzz Design Awards and a Pinnacle Design Award. Transform your pool into a modern masterpiece.

cards.title: Automation & Smart Systems
cards.description: Certified Jandy iAqualink automation, TruSense chemistry monitoring, and AquaPure salinity control for effortless, app-controlled pool management.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Professional-grade maintenance and compliance management for hotels, resorts, and commercial properties throughout South Florida.

how_it_works.headline: Your Luxury Pool Experience in Three Steps

steps.title: Schedule a Private Consultation
steps.description: Contact us to arrange a complimentary on-site evaluation. We will assess your property, discuss your vision, and provide a detailed proposal tailored to your needs.

steps.title: We Craft Your Solution
steps.description: Our award-winning team designs a custom plan, whether it is a new build, renovation, leak repair, or ongoing maintenance. Every detail is engineered for excellence.

steps.title: Enjoy Effortless Luxury
steps.description: Relax while we handle everything. From construction milestones to weekly concierge care, your pool stays flawless and your time stays yours.

about.label: Why South Florida Trusts Somar Pools
about.headline: 25+ Years of Award-Winning Pool Excellence
about.description: Founded in 2000, Somar Pools has built a reputation as South Florida's premier luxury pool company. Owner Mario Ramos and his team combine visionary design with advanced engineering, serving discerning homeowners, celebrity clients, and prestigious builders from Fort Lauderdale to Miami Beach. Our six consecutive Houzz Design Awards and Pinnacle Design Award speak to the standard we set on every project.

features.title: Licensed & Award-Winning
features.description: Licensed Florida pool contractor with six consecutive Houzz Design Awards, a Pinnacle Design Award, and BBB A+ rating.

features.title: Advanced Leak Technology
features.description: We deploy electronic listening devices, pressure testing equipment, and dye-tracing technology to find leaks other companies cannot.

features.title: White-Glove Service Standard
features.description: Every interaction reflects our commitment to discretion, precision, and the kind of care that luxury properties deserve.

pricing.headline: Premium Service. Transparent Pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Every engagement is custom-tailored to your property. Contact us for a complimentary consultation and detailed proposal.

guarantee.headline: Our Commitment to Excellence
guarantee.description: If any aspect of our service does not meet your expectations, we will return and make it right at no additional charge. With over 25 years in business, our reputation is built on delivering results that exceed what our clients envision. Your complete satisfaction is not just a promise, it is the standard we have maintained since 2000.

faqs.question: What areas does Somar Pools serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Miami-Dade County, Broward County, and Palm Beach County, including Fort Lauderdale (Las Olas Isles, Rio Vista, Harbor Beach, Coral Ridge), Miami Beach, Golden Beach, Coconut Grove, Coral Gables, Pinecrest, Boca Raton, and select Caribbean projects.

faqs.question: How does your leak detection process work?
faqs.answer: We use a combination of electronic listening devices, pressure testing equipment, and dye-tracing technology to pinpoint leaks with surgical precision. Many clients come to us after other companies failed to locate their leak. We typically resolve the issue the same day we find it.

faqs.question: What makes your concierge maintenance different?
faqs.answer: Our concierge service goes beyond basic cleaning. We provide proactive equipment monitoring, detailed service reports, water chemistry optimization, and priority scheduling. We treat your pool with the same care and discretion you would expect from any premium service provider.

faqs.question: Do you handle both residential and commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide full-service solutions for luxury residences, estates, and commercial properties including hotels and resort communities. Commercial clients receive dedicated account management and compliance-focused maintenance programs.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool build take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary based on design complexity, permitting, and site conditions. A typical luxury pool build in South Florida ranges from 8 to 16 weeks. We provide a detailed project timeline during your consultation and keep you informed at every milestone.

testimonials.name: Lauri B.
testimonials.text: From start to finish they were prompt, every step of the way!! The quality of work is beyond what we imagined!!

testimonials.name: Scott A.
testimonials.text: After Van Kirk finished it, it leaked a little for a consistent full year... Somar found the poor craftsmanship of Van Kirk and fixed it in 1 day.

testimonials.name: Ryan F.
testimonials.text: Mario and his team are amongst the most outstanding professionals with whom we've worked in the Miami area.
